dao_info.sql_content:
SELECT
            m.id id,
            m.parent_id parentId,
            m.create_time createTime,
            m.title title,
            m.level level,
            m.sort sort,
            m.name name,
            m.icon icon,
            m.hidden hidden
        FROM
             ums_role_menu_relation rmr
                LEFT JOIN ums_menu m ON rmr.menu_id = m.id
        WHERE
            rmr.role_id = #{roleId}
          AND m.id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            m.id

SELECT
            m.id id,
            m.parent_id parentId,
            m.create_time createTime,
            m.title title,
            m.level level,
            m.sort sort,
            m.name name,
            m.icon icon,
            m.hidden hidden
        FROM
             ums_role_menu_relation rmr
                LEFT JOIN ums_menu m ON rmr.menu_id = m.id
        WHERE
            rmr.role_id = #{roleId}
          AND m.id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            m.id

SELECT
            m.id id,
            m.parent_id parentId,
            m.create_time createTime,
            m.title title,
            m.level level,
            m.sort sort,
            m.name name,
            m.icon icon,
            m.hidden hidden
        FROM
             ums_role_menu_relation rmr
                LEFT JOIN ums_menu m ON rmr.menu_id = m.id
        WHERE
            rmr.role_id = #{roleId}
          AND m.id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            m.id

analysis_limitations.description: 无法覆盖通过反射、Lambda、方法引用、动态代理发起的调用
analysis_limitations.impact: 向上分析可能遗漏实际调用者，结果属于'过于乐观的下界'

analysis_limitations.description: CHA 解析基于静态类层次，无法处理运行时类型确定
examples: 条件分支中不同实现类赋值
analysis_limitations.impact: 可能包含不可达调用路径（假阳性），或遗漏某些实现类（假阴性）
